title: Peace
content:
No more to watch by Night's eternal shore,
        With England's chivalry at dawn to ride;
    No more defeat, faith, victory---O! no more
        A cause on earth for which we might have died.
meaning:
Henry John Newbolt, Sir's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Peace"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
